Defendant Swinerton Builder'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Christopher Hersom, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party James Antrim

RULING:
Defendant Swinerton Builder's motion for summary judgment. No other appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is denied. Defendant's alternative motion for summary adjudication Issue 1 (premises owner/contractor liability) is granted in part and denied in part. It is granted as to defendant's retained control and hazardous condition arguments. It is denied as to the allegedly negligent actions of defendant's employees working in the presence of plaintiff. Defendant's motion for summary adjudication as to Issue 2 (punitive damages) is off calendar based on plaintiff's representation that this claim is being withdrawn, although there is not yet a dismissal on file. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)

Defendant Anning-Johnson Co.'S Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Carlos R. Jimenez, Esq. of ARCHER NORRIS (925-930-6600), appearing for defendant / moving party Anning-Johnson Co.
Christopher Hersom, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party James Antrim

RULING:
Defendant Anning-Johnson Co.'s motion for summary judgment. Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant's motion is denied. Plaintiff's deposition testimony and discovery responses, Mr. Warren's deposition testimony, and Mr. Ay's declaration and its attachments create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to an asbestos-containing product attributable to defendant. Defendant's alternative motion for summary adjudication is off calendar as to the claims for strict products liability and false representation because those claims have been dismissed. Defendant's objections to Mr. Ay's declaration and the documents attached to it, are overruled. Prevailing party is to prepare an order. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =(220/HEK)
